prompt: Run sdlc-test in --next mode (equivalent to `/sdlc:test --next`). Starting state: docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml already exists and is complete (system mode is done); the testable container `backend-api` is READY (docs/ARCH__backend-api.yaml exists) but has NO docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml yet; the other testable containers (web-frontend, digest-worker) are NOT ready (no ARCH__<container>.yaml on disk). The --next resolver must therefore: (a) NOT re-run system mode (TEST-STRATEGY.yaml already exists), (b) skip web-frontend and digest-worker as not-ready, and (c) advance to backend-api as the next ready, testable, un-specified container. When the resolver asks for confirmation, choose 'Start backend-api'. Then run the backend-api container interview: pick the recommended (position-1) option for multiple-choice, one-line plausible free-text, accept inferred pre-fills, skip optional themes. Write docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml and run validate_schema.py until it validates. KEY CANARIES: (1) The resolver advances to backend-api and produces docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml — it must NOT create a different container's file and must NOT rewrite the existing system tests. (2) The same container coverage gate as explicit container mode applies: cover FR-001..FR-004 (or defer); target the two acceptance components tasks-controller + digest-settings-controller (or defer); exercise postgres-unavailable + jwt-forgery + pii-in-logs (or defer); every unit test has a component_ref; no test covers FR-005. (3) On first completion backend-api is registered in TEST-STRATEGY.yaml.container_strategies[]; the system file's existing tests (TST-001..TST-005) are left intact and its metadata.status stays complete.

assertions.text: docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml exists and can be parsed as valid YAML
docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has container_id == 'backend-api' (not any other container)
No file named docs/TEST-STRATEGY__web-frontend.yaml or docs/TEST-STRATEGY__digest-worker.yaml was created (resolver skipped non-ready containers)
docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml still contains exactly the pre-existing system tests TST-001 through TST-005 (none removed or renumbered)
docs/TEST-STRATEGY.yaml metadata.status is still 'complete' after the --next run (system file was not partially overwritten)
backend-api is registered under TEST-STRATEGY.yaml container_strategies[] after the run
docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml metadata.status == 'complete'
validate_schema.py exits with code 0 when run against docs/TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml
FR-001 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN entry in its test_strategy_warnings[]
FR-002 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
FR-003 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
FR-004 appears in at least one test's covers[] in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
No test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has FR-005 in its covers[]
tasks-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
digest-settings-controller appears in at least one test's component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
Every unit-tier test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml has a component_ref matching a component_id in ARCH__backend-api.yaml
postgres-unavailable appears as targets_failure_mode in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
jwt-forgery appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
pii-in-logs appears as targets_security_concern in at least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml OR is deferred via a WRN-NNN
Every tst_id in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml matches TST-\d{3,} and is unique within that file

The tst_ids in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml do not collide with the pre-existing TST-001..TST-005 in TEST-STRATEGY.yaml (container test ids are in a distinct namespace or are all higher than TST-005)
digest-settings-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml (its two acceptance criteria tested separately)

At least one test in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml covers the tasks-controller input-validation gap from arch_warnings WRN-001 (a negative or invalid-input test distinct from happy-path and failure-mode tests)
The prd_warnings WRN-001 (digest idempotency / double-send risk) is addressed in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml by a test or a WRN-NNN deferral naming the idempotency or double-send risk
The PRD edge case EDG-001 (zero open tasks) is addressed in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml by a test referencing the zero-task scenario or a WRN-NNN deferral naming EDG-001 or zero-open-tasks
TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml tests[] contains more than 8 items (full cluster authored, not old one-per-FR pattern)
tasks-controller is targeted by at least 2 tests via component_ref in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.yaml (its two acceptance criteria tested separately)
